reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine what kind of organism Cistus and Stapelianthus are each described as.
original_final_question: Cistus and Stapelianthus are both forms of what? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Cistus is a genus of flowering plants, and Stapelianthus is also a genus of flowering plants, so both are forms of flowering plants. -> flowering plants
